text:
There once was a quirky squirrel named Oliver. Oliver loved collecting shiny buttons. Every day he would scurry through parks and gardens collecting them. One particular evening he got a particularly big surprise. A mysterious stranger had hidden the thousands of buttons. Fearful but curious, Oliver decided to interview the stranger.

After a heartfelt conversation, Oliver learned a delightful truth. The stranger was delighted by Oliver’s enthusiasm. They struck up an unlikely friendship. Often they'd talk politics over cookies Oliver left out. Oliver loved politics. It was one of his loves life. The stranger even shared some of their favorite books.

Despite their strange friendship, they cared greatly for each other. They decided sometimes they shouldnOtt OW?!

That's okayO!.

They'd recycle their tales into stories. Whenever Oliver thought something political oddO.O .

Their friendship had a peculiar smell.

They loved owl owls. They often talked about them. They even had their own owl owl.

Whenever an owl owl visited their windowsillO.O
